_meta.description: Universal taxonomy policy for Drywall Toolbox. A single canonical functional-category set is applied to every brand. The allowed WC path is always: {wc_root} > {brand_label} > {canonical_wc_label}. No per-brand divergence is permitted.

_design_rule: All brands share the same 12 functional categories. Brand name is a WC path namespace only — it does not change which categories are available.

category_key_normalization._comment: Maps any _dtb_category_key value (legacy, shorthand, brand-specific) to the canonical ID. Applied by build_launch_catalog.py before generating WC paths.

sku_category_overrides._comment: Per-SKU canonical category overrides for products whose _dtb_category_key maps to the wrong canonical ID.

category_aliases._comment: Normalizes any legacy or brand-specific WC path to the current canonical path. Applied by build_launch_catalog.py normalize_category() before import.
